overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City. The player moves from a narrow urban canyon between corporate towers, through an open plaza with an elevated orange roadway, and into an indoor maintenance garage with automated cleaning vehicles. The scene transitions from outdoor dusk to indoor artificial lighting.

tall vertical digital advertising displays showing red and pink graphics

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow urban canyon between towering corporate buildings. Digital billboards including a prominent TECHNICA sign illuminate the concrete walls. The player walks forward through the enclosed passage toward a distant opening where skyscrapers are visible against the dusk sky.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban plaza dominated by an orange elevated roadway structure. Palm trees line the walkway as the player descends stairs toward street level. Neon digital billboards illuminate the right side while pedestrians walk in the distance. The sky is partially visible between the towering buildings.

orange and white autonomous street cleaning vehicle parked near entrance

segments.scene_description: Moving along the street level, the player approaches a maintenance facility entrance where automated cleaning vehicles are parked. Palm trees line the right side of the street while pedestrians walk in the area. The scene transitions from the open plaza to the facility entrance.

segments.scene_description: The player enters the indoor maintenance garage where artificial lighting replaces the natural dusk. Large automated cleaning vehicles are parked throughout the space. Yellow numbered banners hang from the industrial ceiling, and work areas with tool cabinets become visible as the player moves deeper into the facility.

scene_state.functional_zone: maintenance bay with workbenches and vehicle lifts

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the maintenance facility, the player passes a car lift structure and a purple vending machine. The environment shows signs of active use with workbenches, tool cabinets, and scattered equipment. A worker is visible in the background near the far end of the garage as the player explores the industrial interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a claustrophobic corporate corridor into a wide urban plaza and finally into a maintenance facility. It begins in a narrow urban canyon between towering buildings, moving past glowing digital billboards and a prominent Technica sign toward a distant opening. As the camera emerges from the enclosure, the scene opens into a vast plaza dominated by a massive orange elevated roadway and lined with palm trees. The perspective then descends stairs to street level, passing neon displays and pedestrians before turning toward the entrance of a maintenance facility. The shot concludes as the environment shifts from the open dusk sky of the city to the functional area where automated cleaning vehicles are parked.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the fading natural light of dusk into the artificial glow of an industrial maintenance garage. It begins as the player enters the facility, where the outdoor atmosphere is replaced by indoor lighting and large automated cleaning vehicles parked beneath yellow numbered banners. As the camera moves deeper into the space, the environment shifts toward active work zones filled with tool cabinets and industrial equipment. The scene then expands to reveal a car lift structure and a purple vending machine before finally passing by scattered workbenches toward a worker stationed at the far end of the garage.
